title: Jinbe Offers His Blood
description: On pages 8–11, this part follows Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6, Unknown person #7. The central beat is jinbe offers his blood.
scene: The scene focuses on jinbe offers his blood, with Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6, Unknown person #7 shaping the conflict.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Wadatsumi's a million times his size!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: The water shot straight through his body!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: How're you liking the sky, puffer?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Why's there a human in Da Sky?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Haven't got much guts, have you?

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: ...is the toughest part of cooking pufferfish.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: All our best fighters were defeated!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: I guess I must've been thinking of...

summary: Jinbe Offers His Blood. This part advances the end of the Fish-Man Island conflict and the island’s attempt to move beyond inherited hatred.
